productDisplayName: Nike Men Navy Blue Flyclave LTR Casual Shoes
description: nike's reinterpretation of the formal brogue, this colour blocked low-top nike Flycave LTR is a sartorial dream. Inspired from clean cut Basketball shoes, this casual shoe's suede upper and two tone design can be styled from classic sporty to stylish quirk. Sneaker-heads will absolutely love this shoe. Upper Soft suede upper with perforations on the midfoot area, extending up to the heel Central lace-ups Padded tongue Reinforced overlay on the toe box and heel collar Branding on the heel Midsole Lightweight PU midsole Outsole Thin, vulcanized rubber outsole with exaggerated herringbone patterned grooves Wash care Wipe surface with soft, clean, damp cloth Do not machine wash
